{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Void beasts
| introduced = Reaper
}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Void beasts]] are horrors that claw their way into being from the Void.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c15">''Reaper'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
